zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers Maulay II於1229年出生在英國越可爾福藍波洛時，他的父親Peter de Mauley I39歲，母親Isabel de Thornham32歲。他和Joan Brus至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1279年7月15日之前在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers Maulay II于1229年出生在英国越可爾福藍波洛时，他的父亲Peter de Mauley I39岁，母亲Isabel de Thornham32岁。他和Joan Brus至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1279年7月15日之前在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Maulay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Macaulay  . Compare the Irish form   McAuley  .

variants.name: Macaulay
meanings: Scottish (mainly Ross and Cromarty and Inverness):
from Gaelic Mac Amhalghaidh ‘son of Amhalghadh’, an Old Gaelic personal name of unexplained etymology. Compare the Irish form McAuley , also Manx Kewley , Cowley , and Callow .
from Gaelic Mac Amhlaoibh ‘son of Amhlao(i)bh’, Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Óláfr (see Olafsen ). Compare McAuliffe .

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers Maulay II was born in 1229, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Peter de Mauley I, was 39 and his mother, Isabel de Thornham, was 32. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Brus. He died before 15 July 1279, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Piers Maulay II est né en 1229, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Mauley I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Thornham, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Brus. Il est décédé avant 15 juillet 1279, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Piers Maulay II 1229 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter de Mauley I 39 und seine Mutter Isabel de Thornham 32. Er hatte mit Joan Brus mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 15. Juli 1279 in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Maulay II è nato il nel 1229 nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Peter de Mauley I, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Thornham, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Brus. Morì prima del 15 luglio 1279, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Maulay IIが1229年にイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで生まれた時，父Peter de Mauley Iは39歳，母Isabel de Thornhamは32歳であった。彼はJoan Brusとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1279年7月15日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Maulay II(이)가 1229년 영국 요르크실르 플램루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Mauley I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Thornham(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Joan Brus(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1279년 7월 15일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

mn.Whitby, Yorkshire, , England: Whitby, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Maulay II nasceu em 1229, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Mauley I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Thornham, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Brus. Ele faleceu antes 15 de julho de 1279, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers Maulay II родился в 1229 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter de Mauley I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Thornham, 32. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Brus. Он умер перед 15 июля 1279 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Piers Maulay II nació en 1229, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter de Mauley I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabel de Thornham, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Brus. Murió antes de 15 de julio de 1279, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
